source.structuralReference: plans/chat-mobile-plan/designs/ (existing 26 high-fidelity HTML mockups — copy + layout reference; OVERRIDE the cool-neutral palette with desktop ember)

preserve_existing_mobile_code.rationale: User directive 2026-05-22: do not break existing mobile functionality.
preserve_existing_mobile_code.scope: All writes are confined to designs/ at the worktree root. No file under apps/mobile/ is touched.

preserve_existing_chat_mobile_designs.rationale: 26 cool-neutral mockups at plans/chat-mobile-plan/designs/ remain intact as historical reference.
preserve_existing_chat_mobile_designs.scope: Read-only reference; this new system at designs/ is a parallel unified-theme deliverable.

designIntent.lookFeel: Unified with desktop — ember warm palette as canonical, mobile chrome (iPhone 16 Pro Max frame, dynamic island, safe area, 44pt hit targets) as additive layer.
designIntent.framing: Mobile-first (430×932 viewport in 444×962 iPhone frame), desktop reference frame (1320px) included per view for cross-platform parity verification.
designIntent.themes: Both light + dark — keys identical across themes, only values flip.

token_gap_escapes_resolved: --domain-sidebar-accent (theme-divergent — light goes neutral, dark stays ember)
